body.purpose: Coaching prose, suggestions, descriptions. System sans for readability.

mono.purpose: Navigation, section headers, scores, dates, all data values. The dominant voice.

display.purpose: Score number inside the progress ring. The single largest element.

heading.purpose: Axis deep-dive page titles. System sans at weight 700.

shadows.name: tooltip
shadows.purpose: The only shadow. Applied to the floating axis tooltip.

motion.name: ring-fill
motion.purpose: Progress ring stroke animation. Expo-out for athletic feel.

motion.name: tooltip-enter
motion.purpose: Tooltip fade-in with subtle upward shift.

components.name: Progress Ring
components.description: Apple Fitness-style circular progress ring. The signature score visualization.
components.html: 7.8of 10
components.css: .ds-ring-container { position: relative; width: 140px; height: 140px; } .ds-ring-container svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; transform: rotate(-90deg); } .ds-ring-bg { fill: none; stroke: oklch(0.18 0 0); stroke-width: 10; } .ds-ring-fill { fill: none; stroke: oklch(0.65 0.16 45); stroke-width: 10; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-dasharray: 377; transition: stroke-dashoffset 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-ring-label { position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-ring-score { font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 2.2rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.93 0 0); } .ds-ring-sub { font-size: 0.8rem; color: oklch(0.65 0 0); margin-top: 2px; }

components.name: Axis Row
components.description: Interactive skill breakdown row with label, progress bar, score, and chevron.
components.html:
Decomposition
8›
components.css: .ds-axis { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 110px 1fr 36px 20px; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; padding: 0.5rem; min-height: 44px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 6px; transition: background 0.1s; color: oklch(0.93 0 0); } .ds-axis:hover { background: oklch(0.14 0 0); } .ds-axis:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.16 45); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-axis-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-axis-track { height: 6px; background: oklch(0.18 0 0); border-radius: 3px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-axis-bar { height: 100%; border-radius: 3px; transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.4s ease-out; } .ds-axis-num { font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; text-align: right; } .ds-axis-chevron { color: oklch(0.65 0 0); font-size: 0.8rem; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-axis:hover .ds-axis-chevron { opacity: 1; }

components.name: Delta Badge (Positive)
components.description: Pill showing positive score change from previous session.
components.css: .ds-delta { font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-delta-up { background: oklch(0.72 0.15 155 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.72 0.15 155); } .ds-delta-down { background: oklch(0.62 0.2 27 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.62 0.2 27); } .ds-delta-flat { background: oklch(0.65 0 0 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.65 0 0); }

components.name: Personal Best Badge
components.description: Appears when current score equals or exceeds all-time best.
components.css: .ds-pb-badge { font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.65 0.16 45 / 0.12); color: oklch(0.65 0.16 45); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Monospace navigation link in the page header bar.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; color: oklch(0.65 0 0); text-decoration: none; padding: 10px 12px; min-height: 44px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 6px; transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.93 0 0); background: oklch(0.14 0 0); } .ds-nav-link-active { color: oklch(0.65 0.16 45); background: oklch(0.65 0.16 45 / 0.12); }

components.name: Coaching Panel
components.description: Container for coaching suggestions with crimson bullet markers.
components.html:
• Define acceptance criteria before starting implementation.
  • Ask for test output to verify claims rather than accepting assertions.
components.css: .ds-coaching { background: oklch(0.14 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-coaching-items { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .ds-coaching-item { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 62ch; padding-left: 1.5rem; position: relative; color: oklch(0.93 0 0); } .ds-coaching-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0.55em; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.65 0.16 45); }

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Floating axis detail overlay. The only elevated element in the system.
components.html:
Task Decomposition
Does the human break large tasks into manageable steps?
Press Enter for deep-dive
components.css: .ds-tooltip { position: relative; z-index: 100; background: oklch(0.14 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); border-radius: 10px; padding: 1rem; max-width: 320px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.4); opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); transition: opacity 0.15s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-tooltip-visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } .ds-tooltip-title { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.93 0 0); margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-tooltip-desc { font-size: 0.8rem; color: oklch(0.65 0 0); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-tooltip-cta { font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.65 0.16 45); padding-top: 0.5rem; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); }

narrative.overview:
Like a runner's logbook after a race. Honest data, personal progress, the quiet confidence of knowing your numbers. No coach yelling, just the facts and what to try next. The interface is something you open for 10 seconds after a session, absorb the insight, and close knowing what to work on.

The system occupies the intersection of athletic personal tracking (Apple Fitness, Strava) and developer tool density (Raycast, Linear). It uses a dark canvas with restrained crimson and green accent moments. The aesthetic is terminal-adjacent but never cold: warm crimson gives it pulse, and the monospace data values give it developer credibility.

This system explicitly rejects: the Grafana 47-panel monitoring wall, generic SaaS dark dashboards with radar charts and green accents, corporate HR training platforms, and over-gamified apps with mascots and fake urgency streaks.
keyCharacteristics: Pure black canvas, achromatic neutrals, OKLCH color space throughout
Crimson primary for active/warm moments, green accent for positive signals
Monospace for all data values and navigation, system sans for body prose
Coaching insight leads the page (not a vanity score)
Apple Fitness progress ring as the score visualization
44px minimum touch targets, full keyboard navigation, screen reader semantics

rules.name: The Restrained Color Rule
rules.body: Crimson and green are committed moments: ring fill, badges, signal labels, delta indicators. They never appear as decorative fills, gradients, or background washes. Their rarity is the point. A screen with more than 15% saturated color has lost restraint.

rules.name: The Mono-First Rule
rules.body: If a text element represents data, navigation, or a label, it is monospace. If it represents prose or coaching language, it is system sans. There is no third option. Display fonts are prohibited.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are differentiated by lightness steps (0.09 > 0.14 > 0.18), not shadows. Shadows appear only on floating overlays (tooltip). Adding box-shadow to cards, panels, or containers is prohibited.

dos: Do lead every page with the coaching insight, not the score number.
Do use the progress ring as the primary score visualization. One ring per screen maximum.
Do use monospace for all data elements (scores, dates, navigation, labels, commands).
Do respect 44px minimum touch targets on all interactive elements.
Do provide visible focus indicators (2px crimson outline, 2px offset) on all focusable elements.
Do use skeleton loading states (shimmer animation) rather than spinners.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion by disabling all transitions and animations.
Do maintain the tonal layering hierarchy: void (0.09) < surface (0.14) < surface-raised (0.18).
Do use semantic score colors consistently: green >= 8, crimson 5-7, danger < 5.
donts: Don't use radar charts. They are the generic AI dashboard cliche this product exists to oppose.
Don't use a big-number hero metric. The ring replaces the hero-metric template.
Don't add box-shadows to cards or containers. Tonal layering only.
Don't introduce display or decorative fonts. System sans and monospace only.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accent stripes.
Don't add gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blurs.
Don't use green accents on a dark background as the primary brand color.
Don't create multiple card grids. Single-column reading experience.
Don't use streaks, badges (except PB), leaderboards, or gamification patterns.
Don't introduce alerts, toast notifications, or urgency states.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
